ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image in pixels (width, height) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "subject_ids" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the subject or collection of images */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the source dataset */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file on the server */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "upload_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the image */,
  "image_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_subject_ids FOREIGN KEY ("subject_ids") REFERENCES images ("subject_ids")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data annotator, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "workflow_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the workflow */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workflow */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workflow */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the workflow was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the workflow */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the workflow is active */,
  "workflow_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the workflow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being classified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the classification */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow used for the classification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classification was created */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the classification */,
  "first_task" TEXT /* First task performed in the classification */,
  "classification_status" TEXT /* Status of the classification (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "classification_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the classifier */,
  "classification_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the classification (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "classification_version" TEXT /* Version of the classification (to track changes over time) */,
  "classification_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification event the annotation belongs to */,
  "task" TEXT /* Task the annotation is related to (e.g., palm, flowering, leafless) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates and labels of the annotated regions in the image */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, reviewed) */,
  "annotation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the annotator */,
  "annotation_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the annotation (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "annotation_version" TEXT /* Version of the annotation (to track changes over time) */,
  "annotation_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_task FOREIGN KEY ("task") REFERENCES annotation_tasks ("task_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation task (e.g., palm, flowering, leafless) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation task */,
  "task_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the annotation task */,
  "task_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements or prerequisites for the task */,
  "task_difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the task (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "task_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_tasks" (
  "workflow_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow-task mapping */,
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workflow */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "task_order" INTEGER /* Order of the task in the workflow */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES annotation_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_tasks_workflow_id FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_id") REFERENCES workflows ("workflow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, data annotator, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role and its permissions */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed permissions for the role */,
  "role_metadata" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
